ddls:
CREATE TABLE "alumni" (
  "alum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alumnus */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alumnus is a target for outreach (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the alumnus */,
  "rfm" INTEGER /* RFM score representing recency, frequency, and monetary value */,
  "lifetime_donation" REAL /* Total lifetime donations made by the alumnus */,
  "degrees" INTEGER /* Number of degrees attained */,
  "years_since_grad" INTEGER /* Years since graduation */,
  "male" INTEGER /* Gender of the alumnus (1 for male, 0 for female) */,
  "alum" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual is an alumnus (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the alumnus */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the alumnus */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the alumnus */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the alumnus */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the alumnus works in */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the alumnus */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alumnus has children (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact for the alumnus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_scores" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "alum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alumnus */,
  "inclination_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the likelihood of alumni engaging with university activities */,
  "events_attended" INTEGER /* Total number of university events attended by the alumnus */,
  "event_feedback_score" INTEGER /* Average feedback score from events attended */,
  "volunteer_hours" INTEGER /* Total number of volunteer hours contributed by the alumnus */,
  "social_media_engagement" INTEGER /* Level of engagement on social media platforms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_scores_alum_id FOREIGN KEY ("alum_id") REFERENCES alumni ("alum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donations" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation */,
  "alum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alumnus making the donation */,
  "donation_amount" REAL /* Amount of the donation */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date the donation was made */,
  "donation_type" TEXT /* Type of donation (e.g., one-time, recurring, in-kind) */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific fundraising campaign */,
  "acknowledged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the donation has been formally acknowledged (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_alum_id FOREIGN KEY ("alum_id") REFERENCES alumni ("alum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., reunion, seminar, gala) */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member or team organizing the event */,
  "expected_attendance" INTEGER /* Expected number of attendees */,
  "actual_attendance" INTEGER /* Actual number of attendees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication record */,
  "alum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alumnus contacted */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, phone call, newsletter) */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of communication */,
  "response_received" INTEGER /* Indicates if a response was received (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "communication_content" TEXT /* Brief summary or key points of the communication */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member who initiated the communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_alum_id FOREIGN KEY ("alum_id") REFERENCES alumni ("alum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Development Officer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
